label: Write Policy
description: Per-doc-type write rules the KB gateway derives behaviour from (CASE-482). FIRST-CLASS config DATA — one WRITE_POLICY document per doc_type — not gateway code and not template metadata (metadata is a throwaway scratchpad; load-bearing config lives in documents). A 'mint' policy tells the gateway to allocate a per-type number (number_field) and claim a <synonym_prefix>-<n> Registry synonym, resolving-then-minting on search_key. Absence of a policy doc for a type means natural-identity upsert.
